description: The blank dissent on a directional call. Today's schema gate rejects this shape at run time, but --db mode scores persisted rows that may predate the gate — the harness must judge what is persisted, never assume the cage already did. The dissent metric must fail it as vacuous-by-absence.

memo.thesis: The committee rejects AVGO: the momentum family failed its gates on real data and no validated strategy covers the name, so the desk has no basis for deployment.
kill_criteria: AVGO enters the xsmom-pit winner decile at a monthly rebalance
The close falls below the SMA50 for five consecutive sessions

evidence: Quant validation record as of 2026-07-10: family momentum-v1 FAILED decision gates on real data (null-model p 0.830, deflated Sharpe negative, 0 of 4 walk-forward folds passed); family xsmom-pit holds a decision-grade PASS on the S&P 500 point-in-time universe (4 of 4 folds, null p 0.000, deflated Sharpe 0.998). AVGO is not in the current xsmom-pit winner decile; no validated strategy currently covers AVGO.
